title: helichrysum dasyanthum
intro: Helichrysum dasyanthum, also known as the mountain curry plant or mountain gold, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helichrysum dasyanthum include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
